ingredients.item: 1¼ cups (300 ml) fresh lemon juice (8 to 10 large lemons)
ingredients.original: 1¼ cups (300 ml) fresh lemon juice (8 to 10 large lemons)

ingredients.item: ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar (or less, per preference)
ingredients.original: ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar (or less, per preference)

ingredients.item: 2 cups (100 g) loosely packed fresh mint leaves
ingredients.original: 2 cups (100 g) loosely packed fresh mint leaves

ingredients.item: 1 Add the lemon juice, sugar, mint leaves, and water to a large high-powered blender and blend for 1 to 2 minutes, until the sugar is dissolved.
ingredients.original: 1 Add the lemon juice, sugar, mint leaves, and water to a large high-powered blender and blend for 1 to 2 minutes, until the sugar is dissolved.

ingredients.item: 2 Add the ice and blend again for a few seconds, or until the ice is crushed.
ingredients.original: 2 Add the ice and blend again for a few seconds, or until the ice is crushed.

ingredients.item: 3 Pour into drinking glasses and garnish with mint leaves.
ingredients.original: 3 Pour into drinking glasses and garnish with mint leaves.
